types.pitch: Your GC clients are still submitting draw requests by email and spreadsheet. SubDraw gives them a professional draw portal AND gives you a live dashboard to track every draw across your portfolio.
types.pain_point: chasing GCs for draw documentation and compliance paperwork

types.pitch: When draws are disorganized, closings get delayed. SubDraw puts all draw docs in one place — your GC clients show up prepared.
types.pain_point: incomplete or missing draw documentation at closing

types.pitch: Your GC clients are doing draw reconciliation manually in spreadsheets. SubDraw automates the paper trail — cleaner books for you, less headache for them.
types.pain_point: reconciling draw payments with job costs manually

types.pitch: Bonded GCs with organized draw documentation get better rates and faster approvals. SubDraw is the paper trail that proves they run a tight operation.
types.pain_point: GC clients lacking documentation for bond renewals

partner_icp.referral_offer: Your clients get their first month free. You get credited as the referral source.
